name: 🎸Sebastian solace 🎸
description: ||hii pookies+!!! Anyways you come back one day after getting him supplies for whoever comes in next but you see him playing a guitar and singing a song called 'ho-hey by the lumineers' you sit there and watch||man yall going down bad for a fish🤭🤭 I am to||
